questionHtml:
An electron has a linear momentum of 4.0 × 10−25 kg m s−1. What is the order of magnitude of the kinetic energy of the electron?

A. 10−50 J

B. 10−34 J

C. 10−19 J

D. 106 J

meta.title: An electron has a linear momentum of 4.0 × 10−25 kg m s−1. What is the order of magnitude of the kinetic energy of the electron? A. 10−50 J B. 10−34 J C. 10−19 J D. 106 J
